recap: Rewrote colors.conf with 20-family decade-aligned palette (slots 20-239), updated slots 8-15 to secondary family canonicals, updated colors-build test fixture to match new slot layout.
Updated color-documentation.html: slot 1 hex to #e53e3e, ALT_COLORED to include slots 8-15, NEUTRAL_TERMINAL reduced to slots 0 and 7, all French JS comments translated to English.

Rewrote colors-build with hardcoded slot→family table, auto-generated canonical (F→F-5) and dark (F-dark→F-0) aliases, two-pass flat alias resolution; stripped namedColors/palettes/aliases wrapper from colors.jsonc.

Updated projects-build jq expression to derive backgroundInactive name as familyname-dark (e.g. blue-dark) instead of dark-familyname (e.g. dark-blue); updated test fixtures and added two new behavioral tests.

Updated color-documentation.html: red family to TW v3 shades, gray family to achromatic scale (shade-0=terminal-black, shade-1=terminal-white) with swatch-term-anchor marker, neutral families comment noting gray exception.

Updated colors.conf: red family slots 21-29 switched from TW v1 to TW v3 values; gray family slots 200-209 redesigned as achromatic axis with terminal black/white anchors at shade-0/1 and TW gray-200→900 at shades 2-9.

Updated all alias targets in colors.jsonc to preserve visual continuity after palette renumbering: red→red-4 (14 aliases), red-8→red-7 (git-behind), red-4→red-3 (variable-type), orange/cyan/teal/violet/sky/amber N→N-1 shifts, link/git-remote-algolia blue-4→blue-3, *-light names removed, black/white entries added pointing to gray-0/gray-1.
